# Data Model: pixbiasave


4-amplifier master bias frame for BOSS


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example HDUS List](#example-hdus-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
4-amplifier master bias frame for BOSS

### Naming Convention
$SPECFLAT_DIR/[SPECFLAT_VER]/biases/pixbiasave-[MJD]-[BR][ID].fits

### Releases
IPL4, DR20

### Enviroments
SPECFLAT_DIR

### Approximate Size
49 MB

### File Type
FITS

### Generated by Product
idlspec2d - spbiasave.pro

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
1.1.1

### HDUS List for release DR20
  - [HDU0: PRIMARY](#hdu0-primary)

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another
 - DR20
   - from: IPL4
   - note: No changes

---

## Notes
Historical product, only used for reprocessing of old data. It has been replaced by the boss_pixbias product files.

---
## Regrets
I  have no regrets!
